items.title: I have not heard this specifically, but 1) Ball is a good enough shooter for it to make sense; 2) he has size to be disrputive defensively, which isn't the same as saying he's a good defender; 3) RJ + Dick (and picks, obviously) would work for $.
items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt: I have not heard this specifically, but 1) Ball is a good enough shooter for it to make sense; 2) he has size to be disrputive defensively, which isn't the same as saying he's a good defender; 3) RJ + Dick (and picks, obviously) would work for $.
